title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 192.100 - Inspection of beverages
text:
192.100.  Inspection of beverages. — The department of health and senior services shall have the power and duty to administer all laws, orders and findings pertaining to inspection of beverages, except such as are administered by the supervisor of liquor control, and the director of health and senior services shall delegate such administration to the bureau of food and drug inspection.
(L. 1945 p. 945 § 24)
